revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-4-300

A servo motor producing a limited output motion. The term is also used to apply to a complete self-contained servo mechanism producing a limited output motion.

Reference: B.S.
